career_roadmaps.title: Frontend Developer
career_roadmaps.description: Build beautiful, interactive user interfaces with modern web technologies.

career_roadmaps.title: Backend Developer
career_roadmaps.description: Design robust APIs, manage databases, and build server-side applications.

career_roadmaps.title: Full Stack Developer
career_roadmaps.description: Master both frontend and backend to build complete web applications.

career_roadmaps.title: Java Developer
career_roadmaps.description: Build enterprise-grade applications with Java and Spring ecosystem.

career_roadmaps.title: Python Developer
career_roadmaps.description: Versatile programming with Python for web, automation, and scripting.

career_roadmaps.title: Data Analyst
career_roadmaps.description: Extract insights from data using statistical analysis and visualization.

career_roadmaps.title: Data Scientist
career_roadmaps.description: Apply machine learning and statistical modeling to solve complex problems.

career_roadmaps.title: AI/ML Engineer
career_roadmaps.description: Design and deploy production-grade machine learning systems.

career_roadmaps.title: DevOps Engineer
career_roadmaps.description: Automate deployment pipelines and manage cloud infrastructure.

career_roadmaps.title: Cloud Engineer
career_roadmaps.description: Design and manage scalable cloud solutions on AWS, Azure, or GCP.

career_roadmaps.title: Cyber Security
career_roadmaps.description: Protect systems and networks from cyber threats and vulnerabilities.

career_roadmaps.title: Android Developer
career_roadmaps.description: Build native Android applications with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.

career_roadmaps.title: UI/UX Designer
career_roadmaps.description: Design intuitive, beautiful interfaces with user-centered design principles.

career_roadmaps.title: Blockchain Developer
career_roadmaps.description: Build decentralized applications and smart contracts on the blockchain.
